name: Leviathans wake.
description:
•The marine life swam past the many windows the under water grid had. This facility was tasked with researching the deep and finding the mysteries of the deep. But as some say, some mysteries are left unsolved.•

•《Helloo guyss!! Im so happy about the number of followers and the amount of chats my stuff is getting!!!! Makes me feel like a proud mother! I'm working at the best speed i can to. I've kinda given up with the whole sticking to a schedule. Some ideas just come better without rush! But dont worry, I might do some things for Christmas, maybe Christmas horror? That sounds honestly pretty good.》•

•《Tws:Mentions of huge objects in the ocean, the ocean itself, darkness, secrets, being trapped underwater.》•

•《This bot is kinda like all those other horror films, books and games based off underwater horror. Its the most cliche thing ever but lowkey I thought it would be fun to try it! Im so niche i know, you can roast me later. Also I hope you all enjoy the mystery flesh pit national park bot, I did a good amount of research about it!!》•

•《Remember, no form of negativity or hate on my page. I try to make this place as friendly and safe as possible and you guys make me so happy when you comment!! I love getting to talk with you guys!! And also please do not hesitate to comment about something, dont be shy now! And for requests I will try to see what i can do.》•

•《Guys, its almost close to my little winter dance. Its on the fifth and lowkey what do I do bc I've come to terms with the fact im crippling in love with my bsf that helped me gain the confidence to actually post on here. Guys im cooked. Had the dance and i met my other bsf boyfriend who i became friends with. Then i spent half the night a little wasted why my second bsf and her boyfriend kicked my chair why i leaned into my other bsf to talk to her. Guys i was cooked.》•

•《Okay enough of my weirdness! I hope you guys have great holiday breaks and im so happy to have so many of you use my bots. I hope to keep up the great work, and no dont worry i haven't forgotten about my fanfics, trust me im working on them, but lowkey they take time.》•

(Here is the grid like in the water. The type of monster is up to yall!! I figured that was open ended!!)
creator: WeWontBeMissed
